original_query: select l_returnflag, l_linestatus, sum(l_quantity) as sum_qty, sum(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge, avg(l_quantity) as avg_qty, avg(l_extendedprice) as avg_price, avg(l_discount) as avg_disc, count(*) as count_order from lineitem where l_shipdate <= date '1998-12-01' - interval '93' day group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus;
rewritten_query: select l_returnflag, l_linestatus, sum(l_quantity) as sum_qty, sum(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge, avg(l_quantity) as avg_qty, avg(l_extendedprice) as avg_price, avg(l_discount) as avg_disc, count(*) as count_order from lineitem where l_shipdate <= date '1998-12-01' - interval '93' day group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

original_query:
SELECT
  l_returnflag,
  l_linestatus,
  SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
  SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
  SUM(disc_price) AS sum_disc_price,
  SUM(disc_price * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
  AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty,
  AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
  AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
  COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM (
  SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    l_quantity,
    l_extendedprice,
    l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS disc_price,
    l_discount,
    l_tax
  FROM lineitem
  WHERE l_shipdate <= DATE '1998-09-25'
) AS precomputed
GROUP BY l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

  AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
  AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
  COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM (

    l_quantity,

) AS precomputed
GROUP BY l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

original_query:
WITH min_supplycosts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    INNER JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation ON nation.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region ON region.r_regionkey = nation.n_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
    s.s_acctbal, 
    s.s_name, 
    n.n_name, 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_mfgr, 
    s.s_address, 
    s.s_phone, 
    s.s_comment
FROM part p
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
INNER JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
INNER JOIN min_supplycosts m ON p.p_partkey = m.ps_partkey 
    AND ps.ps_supplycost = m.min_ps_supplycost
WHERE 
    p.p_size = 6 
    AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY 
    s.s_acctbal DESC, 
    n.n_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
MATERIALIZE(min_supplycosts) HashJoin(p ps) HashJoin(ps s) HashJoin(s n) HashJoin(p m) Rows(p ps s n m #75)
WITH min_supplycosts AS ( HashJoin(partsupp supplier) HashJoin(supplier nation) HashJoin(nation region)
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    INNER JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation ON nation.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region ON region.r_regionkey = nation.n_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
    s.s_acctbal, 
    s.s_name, 
    n.n_name, 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_mfgr, 
    s.s_address, 
    s.s_phone, 
    s.s_comment
FROM part p
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
INNER JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
INNER JOIN min_supplycosts m ON p.p_partkey = m.ps_partkey 
    AND ps.ps_supplycost = m.min_ps_supplycost
WHERE 
    p.p_size = 6 
    AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY 
    s.s_acctbal DESC, 
    n.n_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

WITH min_supply_costs AS (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
    FROM 
        partsupp
        JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
        JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        region.r_name = 'ASIA'
    GROUP BY 
        ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
    s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment
FROM 
    part
    JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    JOIN min_supply_costs msc ON part.p_partkey = msc.ps_partkey 
        AND partsupp.ps_supplycost = msc.min_ps_supplycost
WHERE 
    part.p_size = 46
    AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
    AND region.r_name = 'ASIA'
ORDER BY 
    s_acctbal DESC, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

  SELECT 
    ps_partkey, 
    MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_supplycost
  FROM 
    partsupp
    JOIN part ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
    JOIN nation ON nation.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
    JOIN region ON region.r_regionkey = nation.n_regionkey
  WHERE 
    region.r_name = 'AMERICA'
    AND part.p_size = 3
    AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
  GROUP BY 
    ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
  s_acctbal, 
  s_name, 
  n_name, 
  p_partkey, 
  p_mfgr, 
  s_address, 
  s_phone, 
  s_comment 
FROM 
  part
  JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
  JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
  JOIN nation ON nation.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
  JOIN region ON region.r_regionkey = nation.n_regionkey
  JOIN min_ps ON min_ps.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey 
              AND partsupp.ps_supplycost = min_ps.min_supplycost
WHERE 
  region.r_name = 'AMERICA'
  AND part.p_size = 3
  AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY 
  s_acctbal DESC, 
  n_name, 
  s_name, 
  p_partkey 
LIMIT 100;

FROM

  JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey

  JOIN nation ON nation.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey

original_query: select l_orderkey, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority from customer, orders, lineitem where c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' and c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_orderdate < date '1995-03-20' and l_shipdate > date '1995-03-20' group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority order by revenue desc, o_orderdate limit 10;

original_query:
SELECT 
    o.o_orderkey AS l_orderkey, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue, 
    o.o_orderdate, 
    o.o_shippriority 
FROM 
    customer c
    INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
WHERE 
    c.c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1995-03-14' 
    AND l.l_shipdate > DATE '1995-03-14' 
GROUP BY 
    o.o_orderkey, 
    o.o_orderdate, 
    o.o_shippriority 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC, 
    o.o_orderdate 
LIMIT 10;
rewritten_query:

    o.o_orderkey AS l_orderkey, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue, 
    o.o_orderdate, 
    o.o_shippriority 
FROM 
    customer c
    INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
WHERE 
    c.c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1995-03-14' 
    AND l.l_shipdate > DATE '1995-03-14' 
GROUP BY 
    o.o_orderkey, 
    o.o_orderdate, 
    o.o_shippriority 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC, 
    o.o_orderdate 
LIMIT 10;

original_query:
SELECT 
  n.n_name, 
  SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
  region r
  JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
  JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
  JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
  JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
  JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
    AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
  r.r_name = 'AMERICA'
  AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1993-01-01'
  AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1993-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
GROUP BY 
  n.n_name
ORDER BY 
  revenue DESC;

  JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey

original_query:
SELECT 
    supp_nation, 
    cust_nation, 
    l_year, 
    SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation, 
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation, 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year, 
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM lineitem
    JOIN supplier ON lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey 
        AND n1.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey 
        AND n2.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    WHERE 
        l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
        AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    supp_nation, 
    cust_nation, 
    l_year, 
    SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation, 
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation, 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year, 
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM lineitem
    JOIN supplier ON lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey 
        AND n1.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey 
        AND n2.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    WHERE 
        l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
        AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

original_query:
SELECT 
    n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
    n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    supplier
    JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    (n1.n_name, n2.n_name) IN (('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE'), ('FRANCE', 'ETHIOPIA'))
    AND l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    n1.n_name, 
    n2.n_name, 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate)
ORDER BY 
    supp_nation, 
    cust_nation, 
    l_year;

original_query:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
)
SELECT 
     supp_nation, 
     cust_nation, 
     l_year, 
     SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
     SELECT 
         n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
         n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
         EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
         l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
     FROM 
         supplier
         JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'UNITED STATES'
         JOIN filtered_lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = filtered_lineitem.l_suppkey
         JOIN orders ON filtered_lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
         JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
         JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'ALGERIA'
     UNION ALL
     SELECT 
         n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
         n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
         EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
         l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
     FROM 
         supplier
         JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'ALGERIA'
         JOIN filtered_lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = filtered_lineitem.l_suppkey
         JOIN orders ON filtered_lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
         JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
         JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'UNITED STATES'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY 
     supp_nation, 
     cust_nation, 
     l_year
ORDER BY 
     supp_nation, 
     cust_nation, 
     l_year;

original_query:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM orders.o_orderdate) AS o_year, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN n2.n_name = 'CANADA' THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) 
        / SUM(lineitem.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem.l_discount)) AS mkt_share
FROM region
JOIN nation n1 ON n1.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey AND region.r_name = 'AMERICA'
JOIN customer ON customer.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
JOIN orders ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    AND orders.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
JOIN lineitem ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN part ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey AND part.p_type = 'ECONOMY PLATED STEEL'
JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
JOIN nation n2 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM orders.o_orderdate)
ORDER BY o_year;

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM orders.o_orderdate) AS o_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN n2.n_name = 'FRANCE' THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) 
        / SUM(lineitem.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem.l_discount)) AS mkt_share
FROM 
    region
    INNER JOIN nation n1 ON n1.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    INNER JOIN customer ON customer.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN orders ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
        AND orders.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    INNER JOIN lineitem ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN part ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
        AND part.p_type = 'SMALL ANODIZED TIN'
    INNER JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation n2 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
GROUP BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM orders.o_orderdate)
ORDER BY 
    o_year;

original_query:
WITH african_nations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name 
    FROM nation 
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey 
    WHERE r_name = 'AFRICA'
)
SELECT 
    o_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN supplier_nation = 'ALGERIA' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(volume) AS mkt_share
FROM (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS o_year,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS volume,
        n2.n_name AS supplier_nation
    FROM 
        part p
        JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        JOIN african_nations n1 ON c.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
        JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation n2 ON s.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_type = 'LARGE BURNISHED TIN'
        AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS all_nations
GROUP BY o_year
ORDER BY o_year;
rewritten_query:

WITH african_nations AS NOT MATERIALIZED ( /*+ NO_MATERIALIZE(african_nations) */
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name 
    FROM nation 
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey 
    WHERE r_name = 'AFRICA'
)
SELECT 
    o_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN supplier_nation = 'ALGERIA' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(volume) AS mkt_share
FROM (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS o_year,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS volume,
        n2.n_name AS supplier_nation
    FROM 
        part p
        JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        JOIN african_nations n1 ON c.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
        JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation n2 ON s.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_type = 'LARGE BURNISHED TIN'
        AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS all_nations
GROUP BY o_year
ORDER BY o_year;

original_query:
SELECT 
    n_name AS nation,
    EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) - (ps_supplycost * l_quantity)) AS sum_profit
FROM 
    part
JOIN 
    lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ON lineitem.l_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey 
        AND lineitem.l_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    supplier ON lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    part.p_name LIKE '%red%'
GROUP BY 
    n_name, 
    EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate)
ORDER BY 
    nation, 
    o_year DESC;

ORDER BY

original_query:
SELECT 
  c.c_custkey, 
  c.c_name, 
  cr.revenue, 
  c.c_acctbal, 
  n.n_name, 
  c.c_address, 
  c.c_phone, 
  c.c_comment 
FROM 
  customer c
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    o.o_custkey, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
  FROM 
    orders o
  JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
  WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1994-12-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1994-12-01' + INTERVAL '3' MONTH 
    AND l.l_returnflag = 'R'
  GROUP BY o.o_custkey
) cr ON c.c_custkey = cr.o_custkey
ORDER BY cr.revenue DESC 
LIMIT 20;

original_query:
SELECT 
    ps_partkey, 
    value
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS value,
        SUM(SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty)) OVER () * 0.0001000000 AS threshold
    FROM 
        partsupp
        JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        nation.n_name = 'ROMANIA'
    GROUP BY 
        ps_partkey
) t
WHERE 
    value > threshold
ORDER BY 
    value DESC;

        ps_partkey, 
        SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS value,
        SUM(SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty)) OVER () * 0.0001000000 AS threshold
    FROM 
        partsupp
        JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        nation.n_name = 'ROMANIA'
    GROUP BY 
        ps_partkey
) t
WHERE 
    value > threshold
ORDER BY 
    value DESC;

original_query:
WITH iran_partsupp AS (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        ps_supplycost * ps_availqty AS value_item
    FROM 
        partsupp
        JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        nation.n_name = 'IRAN'
),
total_value AS (
    SELECT SUM(value_item) AS total 
    FROM iran_partsupp
)
SELECT 
    ps_partkey, 
    SUM(value_item) AS value
FROM iran_partsupp
GROUP BY ps_partkey
HAVING SUM(value_item) > (SELECT total * 0.0001000000 FROM total_value)
ORDER BY value DESC;

original_query:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_shipmode
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipmode IN ('REG AIR', 'AIR')
      AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
      AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate
      AND l_receiptdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND l_receiptdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
)
SELECT l_shipmode,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' OR o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' AND o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count
FROM filtered_lineitem
JOIN orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
GROUP BY l_shipmode
ORDER BY l_shipmode;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_shipmode
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipmode IN ('REG AIR', 'AIR')
      AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
      AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate
      AND l_receiptdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND l_receiptdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
)
SELECT l_shipmode,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' OR o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' AND o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count
FROM filtered_lineitem
JOIN orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
GROUP BY l_shipmode
ORDER BY l_shipmode;

original_query:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_shipmode
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipmode IN ('TRUCK', 'SHIP')
      AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
      AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate
      AND l_receiptdate >= DATE '1993-01-01'
      AND l_receiptdate < DATE '1993-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
)
SELECT 
    f.l_shipmode,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority NOT IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count
FROM filtered_lineitem f
JOIN orders o ON f.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY f.l_shipmode
ORDER BY f.l_shipmode;

WITH filtered_lineitem AS (

    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipmode IN ('TRUCK', 'SHIP')
      AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
      AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate
      AND l_receiptdate >= DATE '1993-01-01'
      AND l_receiptdate < DATE '1993-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
)
SELECT 
    f.l_shipmode,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority NOT IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count
FROM filtered_lineitem f
JOIN orders o ON f.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY f.l_shipmode
ORDER BY f.l_shipmode;
